en: Berchtesgaden Alps: Snowshoe hikers trigger an avalanche and are buried. On the move without alpine experience or protective equipment: a group of snowshoe hikers trigger an avalanche and are swept away. The police speak of “luck” for those involved.
la: Alpes Berchtesgaden: Snowshoe hikers felis avalanche et asservatur. In motu sine experientia alpina vel armorum tutela: globus nivis hikers felis NIVIS et rapitur. Magistratus loquuntur de "fortuna" pro illis qui intersunt.
